title: Aetherpunk
description: Aetherpunk adds a new weapon: the Aetherpunk Mace. This weapon is made from a combination of an ancient artifact: the Ancient Core, and the new-Diamond Bottle, which is made from liquifying diamonds into potions.
body:
**Aetherpunk adds a new weapon: the Aetherpunk Mace. This weapon is made from a combination of an ancient artifact: the Ancient Core, and the new-Diamond Bottle, which is made from liquifying diamonds into potions.**

_[ Commissioned by @Kognition ]_

---
**Items:**
- Ancient Core [ Can be found by brushing it up in trail ruins. ]
- Diamond Bottle [ Using a diamond block in a brewing stand into water. ]


- The Aetherpunk Mace [ A Velocity based mace which deals more damage the faster you are going. ]
  - Relocity: [ Reuse some of the velocity from your last strike to boost yourself forward. ]
  - Overload: [ Channel your stored velocity into an overloading impact. ]
  - Volatile: [ Create an explosion on impact making a wave of destruction. ]
---

(Also the mod [Enchancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchancement) is highly suggested for combat and movement within this mod)
